title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Stock Analysis: Buy/Sell/Hold - Q2 FY2026 Results
text: Canopy Growth surpassed analyst expectations in Q2 fiscal 2026, with consolidated net revenue of CAD $66.7 million, marking a 5.9% year-over-year increase and beating consensus estimates by approximately 29%. Canadian adult-use cannabis sales rose 30.2% YoY. Canadian medical cannabis revenue climbed 16.8% YoY. Gross margin improved to 33% sequentially. Operating loss contracted 63.2% to CAD $16.9 million. Net loss fell 98.7% to CAD $1.6 million. Loss per share improved 99.3% YoY to CAD $0.01, beating expectations of CAD $0.13 loss. Analyst consensus rating remains Hold. One analyst rates it Strong Buy, three recommend Hold, one suggests Strong Sell. Average price target of $2.65 indicates potential upside of 120.84%. Despite strong quarterly results, CGC faces headwinds. Stock has declined 70.18% over 52 weeks, underperforming S&P 500.
